scripts.lint:python: uv run --directory packages/ade-engine --group lint ruff check . ../../scripts/python-release && uv run --directory packages/ade-config --group lint ruff check .
scripts.lint: pnpm lint:python && pnpm --filter @ade/api lint && pnpm exec eslint . && az bicep lint --file infra/main.bicep
scripts.format:python: uv run --directory packages/ade-engine --group lint ruff format . ../../scripts/python-release && uv run --directory packages/ade-config --group lint ruff format .
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @ade/api exec cargo fmt --all && pnpm format:python && pnpm exec prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md PRINCIPLES.md docs/**/*.md infra/README.md infra/AGENTS.md infra/local/compose.yaml .github/workflows/deployment_pipeline.yml .github/workflows/python-development-pipeline.yml .github/workflows/README.md scripts/**/*.ts apps/ade-api/AGENTS.md apps/ade-api/package.json apps/ade-web/AGENTS.md apps/ade-web/package.json apps/ade-web/src/**/*.ts apps/ade-web/src/**/*.tsx apps/ade-web/vite.config.ts apps/ade-web/tsconfig*.json packages/ade-config/README.md packages/ade-engine/README.md
scripts.format:python:check: uv run --directory packages/ade-engine --group lint ruff format --check . ../../scripts/python-release && uv run --directory packages/ade-config --group lint ruff format --check .
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @ade/api format:check && pnpm format:python:check && pnpm exec prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md PRINCIPLES.md docs/**/*.md infra/README.md infra/AGENTS.md infra/local/compose.yaml .github/workflows/deployment_pipeline.yml .github/workflows/python-development-pipeline.yml .github/workflows/README.md scripts/**/*.ts apps/ade-api/AGENTS.md apps/ade-api/package.json apps/ade-web/AGENTS.md apps/ade-web/package.json apps/ade-web/src/**/*.ts apps/ade-web/src/**/*.tsx apps/ade-web/vite.config.ts apps/ade-web/tsconfig*.json packages/ade-config/README.md packages/ade-engine/README.md
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.scripts.json && pnpm --filter @ade/web typecheck
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @ade/api test && pnpm --filter @ade/web test && pnpm test:scripts
scripts.test:python: uv run --directory packages/ade-engine --group test pytest && uv run --directory packages/ade-config --group test pytest && uv run --directory packages/ade-engine --group test pytest ../../scripts/python-release/tests
scripts.package:python: uv build --directory packages/ade-engine && uv build --directory packages/ade-config
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:python && pnpm package:python && az bicep build --file infra/main.bicep --stdout >/dev/null && az bicep build-params --file infra/environments/main.prod.bicepparam --stdout >/dev/null
